code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn must_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    panic("byte_at out of range")
  end
end

fn count_at(_ counts: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match counts.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    panic("get out of range")
  end
end

fn increment_at(_ counts: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = counts.len()
  mut j = 0
  while j < n
    let v = count_at(counts, j)
    if j == target
      result = list.push(result, v + 1)
    else
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn find_token_index(_ joined: String, _ target: String) -> Int
  let n = string.len(joined)
  if n == 0
    return -1
  end
  mut i = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut start = 0
  while i < n
    let b = must_byte(joined, i)
    if b == 10
      let piece = string.substring(joined, start, i)
      if piece == target
        return idx
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let last = string.substring(joined, start, n)
  if last == target
    return idx
  end
  -1
end

fn token_at(_ joined: String, _ target_idx: Int) -> String
  let n = string.len(joined)
  mut i = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut start = 0
  while i < n
    let b = must_byte(joined, i)
    if b == 10
      if idx == target_idx
        return string.substring(joined, start, i)
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if idx == target_idx
    return string.substring(joined, start, n)
  end
  ""
end

fn append_token(_ joined: String, _ t: String) -> String
  if string.len(joined) == 0
    t
  else
    "#{joined}\n#{t}"
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut joined = ""
mut counts: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut tok_start = -1

while i < n
  let b = must_byte(input, i)
  if is_ws(b)
    if tok_start >= 0
      let t = string.substring(input, tok_start, i)
      let idx = find_token_index(joined, t)
      if idx >= 0
        counts = increment_at(counts, idx)
      else
        joined = append_token(joined, t)
        counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      end
      tok_start = -1
    end
  else
    if tok_start < 0
      tok_start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if tok_start >= 0
  let t = string.substring(input, tok_start, n)
  let idx = find_token_index(joined, t)
  if idx >= 0
    counts = increment_at(counts, idx)
  else
    joined = append_token(joined, t)
    counts = list.push(counts, 1)
  end
end

let total = counts.len()
mut best_idx = -1
mut best_count = 0
mut k = 0
while k < total
  let v = count_at(counts, k)
  if best_idx < 0 or v > best_count
    best_idx = k
    best_count = v
  end
  k = k + 1
end

if best_idx >= 0
  let tok = token_at(joined, best_idx)
  println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
end
